testCase.name: Dummy Test should successfully sum numbers
Notes API Integration Tests GET /api/notes should successfully return status code 200 and all notes
Notes API Integration Tests GET /api/notes should return 500 when database query fails
Notes API Integration Tests GET /api/notes/:id should successfully return status code 200 and the note object
Notes API Integration Tests GET /api/notes/:id should return 404 if the note is not found
Notes API Integration Tests GET /api/notes/:id should return 500 if database query fails
Notes API Integration Tests POST /api/notes should successfully create a new note and return 201
Notes API Integration Tests POST /api/notes should return 500 if save operation fails
Notes API Integration Tests PUT /api/notes/:id should successfully update a note and return 200
Notes API Integration Tests PUT /api/notes/:id should return 404 if the note to update does not exist
Notes API Integration Tests PUT /api/notes/:id should return 500 if update fails
Notes API Integration Tests DELETE /api/notes/:id should successfully delete a note and return 200
Notes API Integration Tests DELETE /api/notes/:id should return 404 if the note to delete does not exist
Notes API Integration Tests DELETE /api/notes/:id should return 500 if delete operation fails
Health Check API GET /api/health should return status 200 and state UP
